case_title: MARIA ISABEL DE ARENAZA FLORES et al VS. ALFONSO ROLANDO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE ARENAZA FLORES, MARIA ISABEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROLANDO, ALFONSO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE ARENAZA FLORES, MARIA ISABEL DE ARENAZA, MARIA REJON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
